programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fotógrafo profesional Charles Rathbun afirma que la modelo Linda Sobek murió durante un encuentro sexual consensuado que salió mal, pero el cadáver de Sobek y las imágenes digitales cuentan una historia más siniestra.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, el cuerpo de la universitaria Laura Salmon fue encontrado en una granja de Tennessee, cubierto con sus propios jeans y los jeans del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, Tiffany Rowell y tres de sus amigas fueron brutalmente asesinadas en la adinerada área de Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dentro de un cabello
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva al caso del violador de River Park, que asaltó a cuatro mujeres en South Bend, Indiana, durante 1996. Los agentes del orden arrestaron a Richard Alexander, quien fue declarado culpable en 1998 y sentenciado a 70 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de varias mujeres se encuentran en una colina distante en California. La policía hace un descubrimiento cuando una prostituta se escapa y logra identificar a su agresor y su automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Valiree Jackson, de 9 años, desapareció camino a la escuela cerca de Spokane. Su padre, Brad Jackson, denunció la desaparición y toda la comunidad comenzó a buscar a su secuestrador.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Matan a un hombre joven en un misterioso accidente vehicular, pero la evidencia en la escena lleva a los investigadores a creer que no fue un accidente. La ciencia forense reveló lo que pasó realmente y la verdad es devastadora para tres familias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Evidencia del Jefe
programme.desc: Se detalla el asesinato en Seattle de 1996 de la pareja suburbana Raquel Rivera y Jay Johnson. La evidencia del perro, Chief, de la pareja finalmente vincula a uno de los asesinos a la escena.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Horizon

programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore peace at an apartment complex where the residents' dogs do not get along; a family has trouble controlling its three dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.desc: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog plays patty cake and dead; dog balances yard stick on head; cat opening drawer.

programme.title: Animals Unleashed

programme.title: Bionic Vet

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies

programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: Following the work of Dogs Trust, one of Britain's best-loved dog rescue charities, as they find new homes for unwanted and abandoned dogs.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy
programme.desc: The Bulwa family is on the search for a very special rescue dog to give a second chance to. Will it be Lily- a Schnauzer/Terrier mix, Brewster- a Terrier mix, and finally Bubba- a French Bulldog.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: At a house in Hull, Inspector Claire Little rescues two flea-infested Staffordshire Bull Terriers named Roxy and Madison that are missing half of their fur.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy
programme.desc: The Chambers family are visited by three special rescue dogs in hopes of finding a new edition to the family: Abby- a Labrador/Bassett Hound mix, Liam- a Labrador/German Shepherd and Beagle mix and finally Takaro- a Labrador/German Shepherd mix.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: The 159th Great Yorkshire Show is the hottest date in Yorkshire’s farming calendar and one of the UK’s biggest agricultural shows. Peter and Julian are called by farmers across the land to get their livestock into peak condition.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In East London, Inspector Clare Dew breaks down a door to rescue a dog separated from her pups, but Clare has to come up with a creative solution when the dog doesn’t cooperate.

programme.title: 10 Puppies And Us
programme.desc: In this episode we meet 32-year-old telephone psychic Delia as she goes in search of a big breed dog to live with her in her two-bedroom London flat. Louise arranges for her to try before she buys, with a visit from Great Dane Hank, and Leonberger Nelson.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Alan Davies returns for what’s set to be an even bigger and better third series of The Dog Rescuers.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A special episode focusing on births and babies. Julian heads to a local farm where a cow is struggling in labour. And with bringing new life into the world such a vital part of a vet's job, Julian's also hoping to assist in the birth of a career.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.desc: Sean uses Alexis' bid for governor to gain control of Colbyco; Sammy Jo and Jeff develop a deep friendship from their mutual loneliness; Dana tells Adam he was the father of her aborted baby. As Adams turns to Karen for solace.

programme.desc: Alexis warns Blake about Sean's true identity. Concerned for his family's safety, Blake and Dex go to Natumbre to uncover Sean's mysterious scheme involving the Vitron oil deal.

programme.title: FINDING LITTLE ITALY

programme.title: The Great Way

programme.title: The Angel's Secret

programme.desc: Alicia espera la confirmación del encuentro con sus hijos, mientras la tensión entre Perfecta y su hija puede darle un giro a la vida de Hayde. Todos comentan una noticia en el pueblo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta quiere evitar el encuentro de sus nietos con su madre, hace un acuerdo con la profesora Judit, pero se llevan una sorpresa. Alicia recibe una declaración y Justino la hace reflexionar.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia disfruta de la compañía de sus hijos, aunque le hacen preguntas que ella debe contestar. Sebastián y ella tienen un enfrentamiento que trae consecuencias que pueden ser graves.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda y Reinaldo toman un helado frente al mar. Teresa Cristina le advierte a Juan Pablo que si pone a la tía Iris en contacto con Reinaldo lo matará. Rafael habla con Antonio sobre la deuda que tenía con Mirna. Máximo y Bárbara llegan a Miami.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Amalia hace el amor con Rafael en Fashion Motors y pierde su virginidad. Gabriel se aparece de noche en el Gourmet Palmer buscando a Griselda. Kike se pone mal con el regreso de Bárbara, falta al trabajo y se olvida de buscar a Kikito en el colegio.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo siente admiración por Griselda. Ella está furiosa y echa a Gabriel del Gourmet Palmer. Kike busca a Bárbara en el hotel y la enfrenta, le advierte que mientras esté en Miami hará de su vida un infierno. Bárbara llora y Máximo la consuela.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Máximo visita a Kike en su casa y conversan sobre Bárbara, Griselda está presente también. Kike se compromete a no buscar más a Bárbara. Reinaldo cocina delante de Griselda, durante la segunda noche de reparaciones en el Gourmet Palmer.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Speak
programme.desc: Hosted by Joy Taylor, Keyshawn Johnson, and Paul Pierce, SPEAK is a daily sports show giving passionate and unique perspectives on the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: Breakfast Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by Craig Carton, Mark Schlereth, and Danny Parkins, Breakfast Ball is a fun and lively morning show discussing the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: The Facility
programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: For their 20th anniversary, Steven wants a small gathering, but Elyse wants a big party. Everything goes wrong, leading to constant arguing - with the kids worrying how things might end.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is both amazed and furious when a critical admissions interview at Princeton University is shattered by his hysterical sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be riding in the back of a truck driving down a pier. Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top of each of the tables. Contestant must drive their car under a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: There will be a boat that is towing three rafts. A Plexiglas bottom covered in pig parts. The child stands under a large metal shower-head and pulls a chain. Suspended above the water. The kid must climb through the tubes and traverse.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth from the boats to get as many flags. Contestant is put into a vat used for stomping on grapes to make wine. Contestant must walk the length of the truck removing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant must slide down two cables while standing on a small platform. One at a time, contestants pick gifts from under a Christmas tree. Contestants must swim underneath a 20 foot by 40-foot Plexiglas grid that is lit on fire.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed on a platform floating in the water, where they will grab a skid of the helicopter. Player is chained between two poles and covered with bees. Contestants will be seated in the front of a car suspended over the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be contected to a dune buggy by his ankles. Contestant will have to bury their spouse's head in worms using only their mouth. One person from each team will be hanging from the skids of a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be chained to either side of a platform with the contestant having one key to free them from chains. Player dunks their head into a tank and retrieves a cows heart with their mouth.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, partners will hang by their ankles, they will each hold onto one end of a rope and be lifted over the water. Couples will use their mouths to root around in pies made from wax worms, pigs stomach, fish sauce and duck tongue.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Player A is placed on a dunk tank. In the tank is a mixture of cow parts floating in water. One member of the team will be suspended by their ankles underneath a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt, the female contestant will be placed in a cage that is hung from a helicopter and is approx. 20 feet in the air. A dumpster filled with disgusting garbage is placed at one end of an alley.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended high in the air. Player is placed in a coffin with 100 chicken feet and is then covered in rats. Couples stunt one of the team members is hog tied by four ropes and suspended.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants are seated in the front of a car. The driver is blind folded and the passenger must navigate for them. Player is strapped down in a coffin and then covered with 500 Tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will exit a helicopter and release a flag. They will be standing on platforms suspended in the air. Contestant must chew through the cow intestine. Contestants will ride a mini motorcycle across a beam that is suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Heaven and earth collide when angel-in-training Harry Mills, A.K.A "Mr. Miracle" is sent down to a community college during Christmas for his first assignment: to help an insecure student realize her life purpose.

programme.title: Decoration Day
programme.desc: A grumpy man must rejoin his community when his godchild gets in trouble and a childhood friend refuses to accept a Congressional Medal of Honor for bravery in World War II. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: Duke
programme.desc: When war veteran Terry Pulaski's dog Duke becomes ill, Terry seeks anonymous help from a nearby veterinary clinic. It soon becomes a community's quest to reunite Terry with his beloved dog. Stars Steven Weber.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Cities
programme.desc: Based on Charles Dickens' classic, two identical men (both played by Chris Sarandon) - one from England and one from France - fall for the same woman during the height of the French Revolution.

programme.title: To Dance with the White Dog
programme.desc: An unusual love story in which a strange white dog appears and helps Sam Peek, a Georgia tree farmer, cope with the loss of his wife, Cora. Stars Hume Cronyn and Jessica Tandy. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: Three Weeks, Three Kids
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Jennifer's life is turned around when she must take care of her sister's kids.

programme.title: Campfire Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Peyton celebrates one last Christmas in July at the summer camp her parents own.

programme.title: Cancel Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Santa Claus must teach two incorrigible children the importance of charity.

programme.title: Catch a Christmas Star
programme.desc: With the help of his two precocious kids, a widower reconnects with his high school sweetheart, who just happens to be one of the biggest pop stars on the planet.

programme.title: Christmas Dance
programme.desc: An ambitious young financier signs up for waltz lessons to impress his fiancé.

programme.title: Christmas Everlasting
programme.desc: Lucy heads home to hear the terms of her sister's unusual will at Christmas.

programme.title: Karen Kingsbury's The Bridge
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The sweeping tale of Molly Callens and Ryan Kelly.

programme.title: Karen Kingsbury's The Bridge Part 2
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Molly and Ryan are reunited 7 years later to save the bookstore, The Bridge.

programme.title: Naughty or Nice
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Holiday humbug Krissy Kringle receives a special delivery intended for Santa.

programme.title: La Navidad más dulce
programme.desc: Una repostera en aprietos deberá adoptar el espíritu navideño o arriesgará perder un concurso y una segunda oportunidad en el amor. Protagonizada por Lacey Chabert and Lea Coco.

programme.title: Suenan las campanas navideñas
programme.desc: Una fotógrafa independiente, de camino a Cape Cod para celebrar la boda de su padre en Nochebuena, le pide ayuda a un viejo amigo de la infancia para un evento navideño que podría impulsar su carrera.

programme.title: La novia de Navidad
programme.desc: En la búsqueda de una rara flor para un cliente, la planificadora de bodas, Jessica, tiene que ir a un pueblo remoto en Alaska, donde queda encantada con el pueblo y con el apuesto botánico que la ayuda.

programme.title: Vacaciones navideñas
programme.desc: Deseando pasar unas vacaciones relajadas, una escritora de viajes toma unas vacaciones tradicionales de Navidad por primera vez. Por culpa de un problema con el alquiler, se queda varada para las fiestas.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The Cunningham family plans a quiet, old-fashioned family Christmas until Richie discovers Fonzie faces a lonely holiday.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork sends the face-lifting business into orbit when he hilariously rushes to a plastic surgeon to shoot the works after Mindy gives Mork the idea that everyone could use a little improverrent on Mork & Mindy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Naive Mork puts on his own out-of-this-world telethon to help Mindy raise charity funds, but is such a funny failure at fund-raising that he turns to his own outrageous brand of panhandling to come up with the needed money.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy, hired by a small TV station, has a disastrous on-camera debut until Mork leaps to a riotous rescue with his far-out Orkan presentation of the evening news.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork faces almost unbeatable competition for his job as official Earth observer from his Orkan hero, the suave and charming Xerko, who beams to Earth to challenge Mork to an outrageous contest for the right to send reports back to Ork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who has never heard of Robin Williams and scoffs at the idea of resembling him, gets crushed by mobs of fans who think he is the popular comedian, then has a hilarious nose-to-nose encounter with the famous star.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, lonely in Mindy's absence, sets the stage for amazing comical confusion when he gets the visiting Orkan Elder to clone multiple Mindys which he continues to do until he gets it right.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne’s dad and Carmine play detective and set a trap for thieves who have raided the girls’ apartment.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A little white lie brings on a nightmare for Shirley that makes her wish she never borrowed a handbag.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley makes a rash decision and marries an army medic, with the ceremony taking place in a special hospital ward.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Confusion reigns when the girls are assigned to live for a week in a store window display exhibiting futuristic developments.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne’s dad and her pals pitch in to help her face her despair when Shirley moves out after leaving a short farewell note.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne meets up with the space age and a very spaced-out character, as she unleashes space-age havoc in her new job.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne tries to restore her new boyfriend’s self-confidence after he fails to stand up to some tough guys.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne swings into action when she believes the man she's been dating—a former trapeze artist—is out to kill her.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is convinced that she has unleashed the swingingest single ever after she persuades Mork that it would inprove their relationship if each began dating new people and he turns into the hilarious new king of Boulder's social scene.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: The joyous visit by everyone's favorite, Grandma Cora, turns to gloom when she gets mugged in the park, but Mork turns the dastardly deed into a hilarious caper when he and Grandma join forces to even the score.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mr. Bickley's 50th birthday celebration turns into a crazy exchange of everybody's deepest secrets, but Mindy waits until the group leaves to tell Mork somthing she's wanted to say for years.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack and Amy help an old friend in Pike River when they learn a herd of wild horses is in danger. Peter lies to Lou, causing strain in their marriage.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: United in their attempt to save the wild horses, Amy and Ty grow closer. Lou and Peter call a truce while facing false child endangerment charges.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy learns Peter was offered a job in Calgary but didn't accept. Georgie is feeling overwhelmed but she is conflicted about accepting help with Phoenix.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty's plans for a road trip to Montana hit a snag, and Lou confronts Peter about his lies and choosing to further his career in Vancouver.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim starts a rodeo school and deals with a challenging student right out of the gate. Learning his mom is back in rehab, Ty blames his stepfather.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim reconsiders letting Jack help with the rodeo school. Amy and Ty encourage Scott's nephew to carry on his family's relay racing tradition.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou has a shocking admission, Jack tries to keep Tim from crashing Miranda's wedding and Amy finds out how shaky Caleb's partnership with Jesse is.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou and Peter announce their separation, Amy tries to help a devastated Georgie through the transition.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by all of the wedding activity, Amy distracts herself with a rescue horse, but the whole wedding could be off when Ty is booked for assault.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou is determined to give Amy and Ty the wedding of their dreams, but a host of last-minute obstacles make her job unexpectedly challenging.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Georgie must rescue an injured horse while avoiding a dangerous bear lurking nearby. Peter and Lou hire lawyers in their custody dispute.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: While preparing to celebrate the upcoming milestone of graduation, Ty teams up with Amy to give medical treatment to an abandoned horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie asks for Amy's guidance in helping her learn a trick for an upcoming rodeo, but Peter and Lou insist that she prioritize schoolwork first.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack struggles with the impending loss of a loyal friend. Even though she needs help in math, Georgie tries to get Lou to fire her new tutor.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry watches a horror movie marathon on Halloween, and the next morning he thinks Balki has become an alien.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki volunteers himself (and Larry) to move Lydia's piano up ten flights.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: A rich newspaper owner believes Balki is the Crown Prince of Mypos and invites Larry and Balki to his estate.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Both Larry and Balki hate camping, but Jennifer loves it, so Larry arranges a trip.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: In the second of a two-part episode, Larry leads his lost group around the woods in a circle for five hours.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: As Balki prepares for his college entrance exam, Larry plans a surprise party for Balki.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki invites Mr. Gorpley to the Christmas Eve party.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki hires a maid, but she proves too efficient for Larry.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: After Mary Anne moves to London, Balki joins a bike club known as the Motor Psychos.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry tries to get information for the investigative team.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and Balki compete on a television game show.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Mary Anne and Jennifer are the flight attendants for Balki's first plane trip.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki's trip to the optometrist causes trouble when he's needed as a substitute for the bowling team.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki gets hypnotized and becomes convinced he's Elvis.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and Balki are put in jail after they refuse to reveal a source.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and Balki search for a used car.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Lydia plans to marry a man who Larry and Balki believe is a gigolo.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry comes up with a plan for Balki to win back the money he lost at Mr. Gorpley's poker game.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry teaches a college journalism class, but his standards prove too high for his students.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: On his 25th birthday, Balki gets a surprise from home - a wife.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry incurs the wrath of Myposians when he lies about his roller skating skills to impress Jennifer.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: After a minor car accident, Larry plans to defraud an insurance company to help his sister with her tuition.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: When Balki becomes editor of the office newsletter, Larry gives him advice on how to get the dirt.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki's first trip to the dentist goes wild after Balki and Larry accidentally inhale too much laughing gas.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry reports on a money laundering scheme - prompting the scheme's leader to command the office with a bomb.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and Balki find a secret compartment in the chimney containing clues to the works of a famous poet.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry's father comes to visit, and everyone ends up trapped in the basement - as it fills with water.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and his father finally express their true feelings for each other while trapped in a flooding basement.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: The gang plays golf with Jennifer's father. Larry lets her father win, but Balki doesn't miss a shot.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Despite her fear of cameras, Larry convinces Lydia to try out a talk show version of her advice column for TV.

programme.title: Christmas Lost and Found
programme.desc: After years of missing family gatherings, New York City event planner Whitney is off to Chicago to spend Christmas with Grandma Frances. But in an unfortunate turn of events, Whitney mistakenly throws out a box of precious family ornaments.

programme.desc: Santa gives a successful businessman 12 chances to relive the same day so he can repair his damaged relationships with his loved ones.

programme.desc: The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Saben tanto sobre el crimen como cualquier oficial, o cualquier criminal. Son los escritores de policiales y, a través de sus ojos, vemos el asesinato más asqueroso. Combinan las perspectivas de la aplicación de la ley, los delincuentes y el periodismo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1996, dos hombres entraron en una casa de empeño en Birmingham, Alabama, y asesinaron sin piedad a los empleados. Para desconocimiento de los asesinos, una cámara secreta de vigilancia grabó el tiroteo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Fujiko had once betrayed her heist partner Garb, known as the Grim Reaper, and left him for dead. Garb, who has seemingly returned from the dead, is determined to kill Fujiko and has an uncanny ability to dodge bullets with ease.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious cult that idolizes a solid gold Virgin Mary statue abducts Fujiko and they're planning to burn her at the stake as a witch. However, her kidnapper and the cult leader look vaguely familiar to Lupin. Have they crossed paths before?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The National League battles back twice late in a thrilling victory, highlighted by clutch hits from Fred McGriff and Moises Alou. The 1994 MLB All-Star Game was the first NL win since 1987.

programme.desc: Hermosa Beach is one of Los Angeles' last funky beach towns--a place where the hip, young, rich, and beautiful come together.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: Story of the murder that ruined Bermuda's reputation as the "safest place in the world." In 1996, 17-year-old Canadian tourist Rebecca Middleton was killed--and her presumed murderer walked free.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: Shots rang out into the cool San Francisco night. It was fall, 1991 and Artie Mitchell lay on the floor dying. His girlfriend frantically called 911 as his brother stood over him with the muder weapon in his hand.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: On November 29, 1992 the tiny town of Gibsonton, Florida was hurled into the national spotlight. It was the night that someone put three bullets into the head of Grady Stiles.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: A Karmann Ghia aficionado wants some very specific upgrades for his new purchase. Custom trim, wheels, lowered stance, new paint and new upholstery are some of the items that will give this car a new lease on life.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: The pieces that have arrived at the shop are allegedly for a Nova, but the only thing recognizable is the body; the challenge will be to piece car back together and get the body ready so the client can paint it himself.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Joe Martin loves Novas and his eyes light up when a new customer, Eric, wants him to customize a 1972 as a tribute to his brother, if they can find one; Shag and Amanda hunt down a '71, in what appears to be mint condition.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: A 1996 Impala throws the guys for a loop when they discover it's an imposter; the team makes it better than ever, with custom body fabrications, rear subframe and handmade interior.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: A look at how oil kills power because it's not about synthetic versus regular oil and not about a brand-to-brand comparison, but about windage and oil-pan design.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: En 1990, un piloto que volaba su pequeño avión en la Isla Catalina vio un objeto justo debajo de la superficie del agua que envolvía su avión con una luz brillante, congelando sus controles.

programme.title: Estado paranormal

programme.title: Estado paranormal

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: La buena comunicación es una de las estrategias más versátiles e importantes para la supervivencia tanto en animales solitarios como en animales sociales.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks that his parents are having another baby, he seeks Lincoln's advice on how to be a big brother; a fight breaks out in the Loud house when Lori and Leni buy identical dresses.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the Loud parents win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the children with them because the children have promised to behave; when Lucy gets a crush on a "regular and normal" boy, her sisters decide to give her a makeover.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln's social standing is at stake when his four-year-old sister is put into his fifth grade class; the children grow tired of their family van falling apart, so they decide to try to trick Dad into buying a cool, new van.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts, but discover one of them might be more suited for it; when Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori, they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Dad gets upset with the children for never locking the front door, they decide to take home security to the next level; when Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos, he and Clyde attempt to recreate them before his memory fades.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities; when Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are put in jeopardy when they only have one day to complete their list; Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests do not like what she has planned.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the children make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza; Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln does not trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis; when Lana brings home a new pet, whom the children adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the children hear Lily curse, they become worried that they have been a bad influence on her; when a love letter addressed to L. Loud arrives, the family tries to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy extended family, Bobby fits in great, but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Afraid they will be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos; seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues; tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Loud family believe that they are safe from pranks on April Fool's Day because prankster Luan is away at camp; when the children discover that their father is not at his old job anymore, they begin to worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that "ARGGH!" is coming to town; Lori moves to the garage.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde is desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, so he enlists Leni's help; worried that their parents are hurting their health from not being active, the children encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After meeting an impressive family, the Loud parents worry that their children are not doing enough to ensure successful futures; tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters enlist Lincoln, the "Master of Convincing," to teach them how to ask their parents for money; when Lisa's report card reveals that she has failed social skills, she must make a friend in order to bring up her grade.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up; knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the children decide not to tell her about their mother's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: As the Louds prepare for Christmas, Lincoln's sled goes into their neighbor's yard, leading Lincoln and Clyde to attempt a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate; when Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The children give Lily an old singing toy from the attic to help her stop crying, but it quickly drives them crazy; the kids try to convince Dad of the wonders of modern technology after he declares war on their electronic devices.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana convinces the children to go to the Burpin' Burger to meet her racecar driving hero despite the heavy snowfall; when Lincoln goes on vacation with Clyde, he realizes how overprotective Clyde's parents are.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: During a road trip to their vacation destination, everything that can go wrong for the family does.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl; Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family; she seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando Luan escucha por casualidad a sus hermanos quejándose de su comedia, ella decide abandonarla; los niños deciden no contarle a Leni sobre la próxima fiesta de su madre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y su papá van a "Leyendas del Templo Oculto" y no pueden esperar ni un minuto para pasar un día juntos entre padre e hijo; Lincoln quiere ir al centro comercial, pero tiene que cuidar a sus hermanas menores, por lo que decide llevarlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia participa en un concurso de lectura en la biblioteca, pero Lola no quiere unirse. Lincoln sospecha que sus padres le ocultan algo sobre sus orígenes cuando descubre que su álbum de bebé tiene la primera página totalmente en blanco.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los niños le dan un viejo muñeco que canta a Lily para detener su llanto, pero rápidamente los vuelve locos; los chicos intentan convencer a Papá de la nueva tecnología cuando le declara la guerra a los dispositivos electrónicos.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere el sofá para ver su programa favorito, pero sus hermanas no le dejan; Lincoln le deja un mensaje a Lori en su correo de voz, pero se arrepiente enseguida y busca la manera de eliminarlo antes de que Lori lo escuche.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln está cansado de que sus hermanas se entrometan en su vida, pero su opinión cambia cuando se burlan de él en la escuela; Lincoln graba los momentos más embarazosos de sus hermanas.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El papá de Timmy está deprimido porque todo el mundo piensa que él es aburrido, por lo que Timmy desea que su vida sea como una película de acción. Timmy y sus padres son invitados a un club de campo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El padre de Timmy se niega vender a Sparky a su jefe y él le hace insoportable la vida en el trabajo; Timmy y Sparky arman un plan; Timmy desea que sus antepasados hubiesen elegido carreras diferentes.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy, su padre y las hadas quedan atrapadas en un juego de mesa creado por Cosmo; Timmy desea que Sparky tenga una oportunidad de ser heroico.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea que Sparky sea humano; Timmy desea que el Sr. Crocker desaparezca y él se vuelve invisible.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de hacer un trato con Papá, Crocker se vuelve el mejor amigo de Dinkleberg. Timmy desea 5000 Timmys para el Planeta de los Papás.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker intenta provocar a Sparky con una palabra secreta; Catman confunde a Sparky con su archienemigo, Dogman.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá inicia un programa de vigilancia en el barrio; Timmy intenta ganar un concurso por desear tener la familia perfecta.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Sparky tiene prohibido salir con la nueva perrita de Dinkleberg; Timmy desea que todas las mujeres desaparezcan para poner fin a los disgustos constantes de Mamá.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy ayuda a Jorgen a encontrar un nuevo trabajo después de ser despedido; Sparky hace sus propias golosinas para perros mágicas.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker pretende ser el futuro Timmy usando ADN robado; Timmy y otros deciden ayudar a Cosmo a encontrar su varita perdida.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de decidir que quiere ser estrella Vicky obliga a Timmy a que la ayude para obtener su primer papel; Papá descarga a Timmy y las hadas por el inodoro.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Poof finalmente se convierte en un hada padrino, pero, por desgracia, le asignan a la señora Crocker.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Mr.Crocker se convierte en profesor en la Academia de Hadas; Poof empieza a aprender a hablar.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando papá se olvida de todos los suministros para el campamento de los Scouts Squirrely, Timmy intenta suavizar las cosas con historias de miedo alrededor de la fogata.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Cosmo y Wanda llevan a Timmy de regreso en el tiempo para conocer a sus antiguos ahijados, su interacción con ellos altera el futuro.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: La banda busca entre los recuerdos de Cosmo sobre su adolescencia para saber por qué nunca se graduó en la academia.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Poof tiene problemas para dormir, Wanda intenta ayudar leyéndole un libro de cuentos de hadas clásico.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Foop remplaza a todas las mascotas de Dimmsdale por otras mascotas, pero malvadas. Timmy y sus padrinos deberán salvar la ciudad de esta nueva amenaza.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy descubre que él tiene que compartir sus hadas con la chica nueva en la escuela, Chloe Carmichael, pero cuando Chloe se da cuenta de que ella puede usar su magia para el bien, ella desea que todos en Dimmsdale deben compartir y el caos viene.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Catman cree que Timmy ha sido secuestrado, él recurre a Chloe y a Catgirl para trabajar en el rescate; Timmy es acosado por los paparazzi.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Chloe se une a los Squirrely Scouts y salva la tropa, ayudando a obtener su primera medalla al mérito; cuando Tim y Chloe descubren que tienen la misma fecha de nacimiento, deciden competir por la mejor fiesta.

programme.desc: Anthony explores the food culture in Quebec.

programme.desc: Tony goes to the US/Mexico border to explore food, culture and hospitality.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony samples an unusual cut of warthog meat with Kalahari bushmen.

programme.desc: Tony's adventure in Seoul, South Korea, includes kimchi and tae kwon do.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: In Sweden, Tony tries to conquer his unresolved ABBA issues.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
