programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two U.S. Supreme Court Justices have died mysteriously but Justice Chaynedis misses secret agent James T. West's concern for his life.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a Federal prison inspector and his side-kick, Artemus Gordon, pretends he is a preacher when the two are assigned to halt an organized outbreak of terror that has paralyzed a western community.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon are assigned to protect South Seas island prince who insists on going to an exclusive health resort where assassins are waiting to kill him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West, probing the murder by fire of one of his former professors, Dr. Robey, a distinguished archaeologist, is ordered off the case at the request of U.S. Senator Hungerford.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Posing as a notorious hired gunman and a corrupt colonel, secret agents James T.West and Artemus Gordon infiltrate the forces of renegade-army leader Thorald Wolfe.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West is asking the Serbian minister to place his country's fabulous Kara diamond in federal custody until the International Jewel Exhibit opens, when suddenly the gem's case explodes and the jewel disappears.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A tall, powerfully built girl, Kitten Twitty, registers at a hotel and secret agent James T. West carries her trunk to her room, not knowing it contains his archenemy—diminutive, giggling Dr. Loveless.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon find the town of Willow Springs looted and its citizens completely immobile -- victims of a mysterious paralysis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent, James T. West, investigating the murder of a fellow agent, discovers a plot to assassinate the President of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A self-styled maharajah kidnaps secret agent James T. West and holds him captive in his palace.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon again face Dr. Loveless whom, planning to rule a world of "little people," reduces West to a six-inch miniature.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A mad woman scientist creates a bomb-carrying robot identical to agent Westand orders it to kill members of the President's cabinet.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon employ the services of a man who possesses a power of concentration that controls animals.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West gets involved in a bizarre extortion scheme involving green "Venusians" who claim they need gold for spaceship fuel.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows how to transplant a large, mature tree, the guys ask, "What is it?" then, Richard helps two homeowners sleep better at night by quieting their noisy heating system.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin travels to Nashville, Tennessee, where he helps brighten up a kitchen with new pendant lighting. Then, houseplant expert Carrie Kelly shows Roger how to care for cacti and other succulents.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps repair damage done to a lawn when a new well was installed. The guys ask "What is it?" and Tom shows a homeowner how to make curved stair molding with red oak and simple power tools.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger transplants a giant Rhododendron bush. The guys ask, "What is it?" and then, Richard helps a homeowner increase water pressure with an electric water-pressure booster.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom shows Kevin how to repair damaged laminate countertops. Roger rebuilds a brick walkway. The guys ask, "What is it?" and then Richard shows different types of filters for forced-air HVAC systems.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom seals openings around doors, windows, and penetrations into a house. Richard reduces heating costs by installing a weather-responsive boiler control. Tom cools things with a whole-house fan.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom prepares a shower enclosure for tile using a new type of waterproofing system, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger helps install a privacy screen using bushes and a decorative flower garden.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps homeowners build a retaining wall using pressure-treated timbers. The guys ask, "What is it?" then Richard has an easy fix for a kitchen faucet that is making a loud, shuddering sound.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps install a whole-house water filter. The guys ask, "What is it?", Tom helps a homeowner repair a hole in a rubber roof and Richard shares a tip for cutting PVC pipe without a saw.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: General contractor Tom Silva helps a homeowner repair a very dangerous deck, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger helps a homeowner with a hydrangea bush that won't flower.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps homeowners break apart and remove a large boulder, the guys ask "What is it?", Richard fixes loose pipes inside a shower wall and Tom shares a tip for getting a secure grip on a hammer.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard replaces a tank-type water heater with a new "tankless" unit, the guys ask "What is it?", Roger levels a sagging concrete walkway by "mudjacking," and Tom shows how to remove hammer dents.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger fixes a sagging wooden gate, the guys ask "What is it?”, Tom replaces drafty basement windows with energy-efficient ones and Tom and Richard show how to use different types of foam insulation.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and expert painter Rich O'Neil show how to prepare and paint oak kitchen cabinets. Tom Silva visits Connecticut homeowners in need of organization solutions for their cluttered cabinets.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps convert a claw foot bathtub into a shower, the guys ask, "What is it?", Tom shows how to use different types of "fillers" for wood and PVC and Roger installs a solar-powered fountain.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom cleans, stains and seals a mahogany backyard deck, the guys ask "What is it?", Kevin prevents sewage backup in a basement with a flood control system. Tom shows how to remove wood from a hole saw.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows a homeowner how to prune a neglected crabapple tree properly, the guys ask, "What is it?" Later, Richard helps a homeowner install a new "anti-scald" shower-mixing valve.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner quiet his banging pipes by installing a water hammer shock suppressor, then the guys ask "What is it?" and Tom and Kevin install a pre-hung fiberglass exterior door.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Our "kids” episode features projects parents and kids can build together! A raised bed for growing vegetables, an indoor mini-golf course and a model rocket launcher using commonly available items.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner install a new "dual flush" water-saving toilet, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Roger and Kevin head install an in-ground sprinkler system any homeowner can install.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner install a new type of "zoning" control for her forced-air heating and cooling system, the guys ask "What is it?" and Tom helps re-grout a homeowner’s bathroom tile floor.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom prepares concrete basement walls for finished wallboard. Richard shows Kevin how to tie a few basic knots, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger demonstrates how to care for storm-damaged trees.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva helps a homeowner install a new garage door. Then Richard Trethewey shows a homeowner how to "winterize" his plumbing to prevent frozen pipes when the house is unoccupied.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps a homeowner install a new bathroom ventilation fan, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger shows homeowners how to care for their lawn without using chemicals or pesticides.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard repairs a leaking PVC drain trap underneath a kitchen sink, the guys ask: "What is it?", Tom installs a new, bamboo "floating" floor and Roger shows how to clean roof gutters without a ladder.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook kicks off our 8th season by building a cozy campfire pit in a homeowner’s backyard, the guys ask "What is it?" and Tom installs a range hood and microwave over a homeowner’s stovetop.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and an electrician to install a home intercom system, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Richard makes a wood-burning fireplace cleaner and more energy efficient by installing a gas-burning insert.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: Jack snows a stunning skier named Inga into believing he's a downhill champion.

programme.desc: An older woman adopts Jack as her surrogate son and smothers him with motherly love.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: In Kitagawa-cho, reports of violent cases increased rapidly without reasons. At the same time, an airplane crushed and the pilot is also from Kitagawa-cho. What is happening in the town?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: One night, Furuhashi is attacked by a mysterious woman while patrolling. Seemingly her real target is Dan Moroboshi. But why would she do that? During an investigation, Dan meets an old man who sells toys. Is this old man related to the woman?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Akira, a boy who is close to the Ultra Guard member Anne, found his neighbor acting suspicious. After receiving the report, Anne went to Akira's house with Dan, where she witnesses Dan disappearing in front of her! Where is Dan?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Fatalities of young people have been increasing mysteriously in Mt. Iwami. Ultra Guard went for investigation, where Dan lost his life. As an action to take revenge of Dan, the members went into a cave and discovers a “Camera of Life”…

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: In chase of Alien Ayros' spaceship, Station Hawl came back to Earth. The dastardly Alien Ayros kidnapped Furuhashi and Amagi, and demanded to fuel his spaceship up in exchange. However, Ultra Guard will not tolerate an alien outlaw.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Murders of foreigners had been occurring continuously in the largest port city of Asia: Kobe. The perpetrator behind this is reviewed to be Alien Pedan, who misinterpreted the observation rocket as a sign of invasion...

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: After the attack of the super robot King Joe, analysis on how to defeat it has started among TDF. When Dan meets the Alien Pedan who kidnapped Dorothy, Alien Pedan offers a deal: if TDF stops the analysis, they will release Dorothy.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Sakura 9,returned to Earth all of a sudden. The spaceship soon exploded after landing. At somewhere close to the landing point, a young boy found a strange stone, and heard voices talking to him. The voice claims itself as a being from Annon.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: A roof-fall happened at Asaike Coal Mine. The workers were able to evacuate, except for one man - Jiro. Ultra Guard was called for rescue. When they arrived, Dan realized that the young man trapped under the coal mine was the first human he met on Earth!

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: The monthly special training for Ultra Guard was held, and after a skydiving training, Amagi and Soga were lost. When they woke up, they found themselves in a forest with vampire plants and monstrous beings that look like spiders and mites.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Project Blue, a project to wrap Earth and moon with magnetic force to keep them safe from alien invaders, where targeted by Alien Bado. Self-proclaimed as the Emperor of the Universe, they kidnapped the project's leader, Professor Miyabe.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Dan and Soga visited Professor Iwamura, who is known as a stubborn old man, at International Nuclear Research Center, to request for corporation for the frequent earthquakes hitting the Aosawa mountainous area, but got turned away at the door.

programme.title: Ultraman X The Movie
programme.desc: When reality TV host Carlos Kurozaki breaks into a mysterious underground pyramid for a television event, he removes a special gem... and unwittingly releases a diabolical monster called Zaigorg!

programme.title: Ultraman Orb The Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious item is delivered to paranomral investigators SSP. Can Ultraman Orb rescue the New GEneration Ultra Heroes and defeat Murnau who is aiming to turn the Earth into her own jewels? The battle to determine the future of the Earth now begins!

programme.title: Ultraman Orb
programme.desc: UFO sighting! The Something Search People head towards a patch of forest where a flying saucer has been sighted, only to find out it's haunted too! Are they dealing with ghosts or aliens? And what's Gai doing in these woods?

programme.title: Ultraman Orb
programme.desc: A young woman with prophetic dreams sees Ultraman Orb losing his next battle. Will she be proven right, or can Gai rise above fate?

programme.title: Ultraman Orb
programme.desc: The attacks on the city has monster paranoia running high, as a mysterious giant creature starts devouring all the local aquatic life.

programme.title: Ultraman Orb

programme.title: Ultraman Orb
programme.desc: The Planetary Invasion Syndicate sends Orb's nemesis, Jugglus Juggler, to defeat the Ultra hero. Will this confrontation be the end of Gai and Juggler's long feud?

programme.title: Ultraman Leo
programme.desc: An Aboriginal man may just hold the secret to defeating a monster.

programme.title: Ultraman Leo

programme.title: Ultraman Leo

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Chris Algieri

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Oscar De La Hoya

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Timothy Bradley III

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera III
programme.desc: On November 27th, 2004 Erik Morales and Marco Antonio Barrera faced eachother for the third and final time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Jeff Mayweather faced eachother at the Hilton Hotel in Las Vegas in an 8 round bout then ended by technical knockout in the fourth round securing the victory for De la Hoya.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: When his daughter tells him his new beats are old news, Stevie decides to takes his music in a surprising direction. Stevie's old flame Mimi Faust needs a favor for their daughter Eva, but Stevie isn't sure he's up to the task. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie, Joc, and Scrappy help each other get over their worst fears. But Stevie's real concern is that his daughter might be getting involved with the wrong boy. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Faith Evans is coming to Atlanta, and after three weeks without her, Stevie's very ready for some one-on-one time. Meanwhile, a showcase Stevie set up for singer Alexis Bliss runs into a serious problem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie's having trouble with his long-distance relationship with Faith Evans, and a hot tub party Joc throws doesn't make things any easier. Stevie's daughters say goodbye. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Trying to teach the kids business skills, Tip and Nelly help them come up with a plan. But when things start falling apart, one kid proves he's got Tip's knack for hustling and might just save the day. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: As Major's first day of pre-school approaches, Auntie Precious feels like it's time to move on. Tameka isn't quite ready to let her leave the Harris home and devises a plan to keep her around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After Shekinah acts unprofessional during the taping of Tameka's talk show pilot, Tameka worries Shekinah's attitude could jeopardize her hustle. Tameka insists she spend time with an etiquette coach but will it be enough? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Domani is hired for his first paid gig but when he tells Tip he's intimidated by him, Tip has to decide whether or not to go to Domani's performance. Meanwhile, Tameka takes the kids horseback riding but Major is nervous. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Malaysia doesn't believe Jennifer has turned over a new leaf, OG threatens Feby over an insulting rap, and Byron clarifies his role in the spreading of the Thomas rumor.

programme.desc: Jen spreads gossip about Tami and Feby, causing tension between all the women involved, and when everyone gets together at a roller-skating party the wheels come off.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's an action packed opening match as former champion Penelope Pink battles Tiki Chamorro. Lil J-Boogie makes her way as a singles competitor against Ice Cold. Lana Star's Fabulous Four take on The Tonga Twins in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Samantha Smart assures her team of The Classmaster and The Disciplinarian are ready to challenge The Mother Truckers for their championship in the Main Event. The All American Girls and Ariel Sky set out to beat their bullies in the ring.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie and Tormenta battle Laurie and Lindsey Carlson in the opening match. The WOW World Championship Title Match is here as The Beast must prove she can withstand the force of Penelope Pink who has been gearing up to reclaim her title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Americana and Santana Garrett take on Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx. Lil J-Boogie has an opportunity to prove herself against Coach Campanelli. Las Bandidas get their shot at the tag team championship title as they battle The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Gigi Gianni and BK Rhythm take on Crystal Waters and Sandy Shore. It's Stephy Slays turn to battle one of Coach Campanelli's lackeys, Gloria Glitter. In the Main Event, Chainsaw and Siren The Voodoo Doll take on champions The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones is back in the ring for a title shot against The Beast. Teammates Pep Riley and Sasha Sparks vie for a top spot in WOW as they fight Las Bandidas. A rematch is set WOW's biggest Australian Superheroes Genesis and Princess Aussie.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Top Tier has been dominating in the ring, but now they face the joint forces of Lil J-Boogie, Stephy Slays, and Ariel Sky who want to make them pay for their underhanded ways. In the Main Event, Tormenta faces former WOW Champion Penelope Pink.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster and a surprise partner, announced by Samantha Smart, take on the Fierce Sisters. Chantilly Chella and Holidead face off with Las Bandidas. In the Main Event, Lana Star challenges the culprits who ran up her hotel bill.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster attempts to put Santana Garrett into detention as they battle in the ring. Also in action is Reina Del Rey, Sandy Shore, Holidead, Genesis and Katarina Jinx. The action heats up and still, so many questions surround WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW's new arena is the perfect setting for the unveiling of the first-ever World Trios Championship Titles. In the Main Event, Penelope Pink and Princess Aussie will wrestle to determine the one contender for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star is excited about two things...her team, Miami's Sweat Heat, defending their WOW World Tag Team Championships against The All American Girls, and the large amount of money The Mother Truckers owe her. And Lana's coming to collect on both!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: David McLane's major announcement - and major reward - sends the locker reeling as the WOW Matchmaker attempts to finally uncover the assailants who attacked The Beast, who finally returns to the ring for the first time since last season.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Top Tier puts their Trios Championships on the line against The Mighty Mights and Keta Rush. Adriana Gambino makes an announcement that affects the entire locker room. In the Main Event, Tormenta and Princess Aussie team up vs Miami's Sweet Heat.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi's position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Duke's all-powerful Orogoth The Relentless dices Yugi's entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze. Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed. Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Tea helps him uncover the mysteries of his past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck. Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up as long as he believes in the heart of the cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To counter Arkana's Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: the Dark Magician Girl!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes. Will Weevil's royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?
